name: Bounce Blast
description: Bounce Blast is an explosive chain-combo ball launcher thatll keep you hooked for hours! Aim and launch colorful balls to smash targets — chain hits together for massive COMBO BLAST multipliers. Master 5 unique ball types: standard, heavy, explosive, multi-ball, and the devastating void ball. Unlock upgrades in the shop, trigger chain explosions with bomb targets, and defeat 3 epic bosses. Three difficulty modes — how far can you blast?
instructions: Aim and launch balls to smash targets Chain hits for combo multipliers use 5 special ball types collect power-ups and defeat bosses 3 difficulty modes
